zh.lifeSummary: 當Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd於大約1135年出生在英國威爾斯尼德時，她的父親Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales49歲，母親Cristin ferch Gronwy32歲。她和Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I至少有3個兒子。她去世於1162年在英國威爾斯福林爾享年28歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯波斯梅福德。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: O'Callaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Dermot, Donal, Kiernan, Niall, Conor, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Siobhan, Tiernan.
Irish (Cork): from Gaelic Ó Ceallacháin, see Callahan .

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd was born about 1135, in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales, was 49 and her mother, Cristin ferch Gronwy, was 32. She had at least 3 sons with Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I. She died in 1162, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 28, and was buried in Meifod, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd est née environ 1135, à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Cristin ferch Gronwy, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I. Elle est décédée en 1162, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Meifod, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd um 1135 in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales 49 und ihre Mutter Cristin ferch Gronwy 32. Sie hatte mit Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1162 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Meifod, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli con Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I. Morì nel 1162, nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolta a Meifod, Powys, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Owain Gwyneddが約1135年にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドで生まれた時，父Owain Gwynedd King of all Walesは49歳，母Cristin ferch Gronwyは32歳であった。彼女はGruffydd Maelor ap Madog Iとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1162年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで28歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズポウイスメイフォドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd(이)가 대략 1135년 영국 웨일스 그윈드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cristin ferch Gronwy(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1162년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 파우이스 이포드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Cristin ferch Gronwy, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I. Ela faleceu em 1162, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 28 anos, e foi sepultada em Meifod, Powys, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd родилась около 1135 г. в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Cristin ferch Gronwy, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I. Она умерла в 1162 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности мифод, поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I. Murió en 1162, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultada en Meifod, Powys, Gales, Reino Unido.
